---
title: "Regression Scatter Plots with Marginal Distributions"
author: "Bingchen Li"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: united
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

packages <- c("tidyverse", "ggpubr", "ggExtra")
installed <- rownames(installed.packages())

for (p in packages) {
  if (!(p %in% installed)) {
    install.packages(p)
  }
}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggExtra)

df <- read.csv("/Users/libingchen/Desktop/R_plot/3_RegressionScatterPlot/data.csv")

# 统一列名（适配你的数据）
df <- df %>%
  rename(
    x = X_value,
    y = Y_value
  )

# 处理 group（有就用，没有就自动生成两组）
if (!"group" %in% colnames(df)) {
  possible_names <- c("Group", "group_id", "grp")
  found <- possible_names[possible_names %in% colnames(df)]
  
  if (length(found) > 0) {
    df <- df %>% rename(group = all_of(found[1]))
  } else {
    df$group <- rep(c("1", "2"), length.out = nrow(df))
  }
}

df$group <- as.factor(df$group)

# 计算相关性（按组）
cor_label <- df %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    r = cor(x, y),
    p = cor.test(x, y)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0(group, ": R = ",
                   round(r, 3), ", p < 0.001")
  )

cols <- c("#7DB7D7", "#B39DDB")

base_plot <- function() {
  ggplot(df, aes(x, y, color = group, fill = group)) +
    
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    
    # 拟合线 + 同色CI（实线）
    geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = TRUE,
      linewidth = 1.2,
      alpha = 0.2
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    
    # 四周封闭
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)
    ) +
    
    labs(x = "X value", y = "Y value") +
    
    # group 字体变小
    annotate("text", x = min(df$x)+2, y = max(df$y),
             label = cor_label$label[1],
             color = cols[1], hjust = 0, size = 4) +
    
    annotate("text", x = min(df$x)+2, y = max(df$y)-3,
             label = cor_label$label[2],
             color = cols[2], hjust = 0, size = 4)
}
```

```{r density_plot}
p <- base_plot()

ggExtra::ggMarginal(
  p,
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE
)
```
```{r hist_plot}

p <- base_plot()

ggExtra::ggMarginal(
  p,
  type = "histogram",
  bins = 20,
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.4
)
```
```{r save_plots, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# ===== Density Plot =====
p_density <- ggExtra::ggMarginal(
  base_plot(),
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.4
)

ggsave(
  filename = "/Users/libingchen/Desktop/R_plot/3_RegressionScatterPlot/density_plot.png",
  plot = p_density,
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# ===== Histogram Plot =====
p_hist <- ggExtra::ggMarginal(
  base_plot(),
  type = "histogram",
  bins = 20,
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.4
)

ggsave(
  filename = "/Users/libingchen/Desktop/R_plot/3_RegressionScatterPlot/histogram_plot.png",
  plot = p_hist,
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```
